title: Political Philosophy
shortSummary: Explore the ideas that shape political movements — liberalism, conservatism, socialism, libertarianism, and the philosophical foundations of rights, justice, and the common good.
whyItMatters: Every policy position rests on philosophical assumptions about human nature, freedom, equality, and the role of the state. Understanding these foundations lets you articulate why you believe what you believe — and engage honestly with those who disagree.
coreConcepts: Social contract theory: Hobbes, Locke, Rousseau
